observed: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json is a canonical snapshot and additive queue-update records may be newer than that snapshot.
M-002 established canonical lag detection but did not provide a directory inventory or digest-bound change proposal.
inferred: A canonical proposal that omits byte digests cannot reliably prove which queue-update inputs a reviewer approved.
proposed: Inventory every JSON record in operations/queue-updates, hash exact canonical and update bytes, and emit a review-only proposal whose own canonical form is SHA-256 bound.
superseded: Treating a manually assembled subset of additive records as a complete queue history.
unresolved: The proposal is not adopted until an authorized reviewer identity and exact post-application verification are supplied.

privacy_boundary: No private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads were incorporated.
falsification_routes: Modify one source byte and confirm the proposal digest changes.
Introduce conflicting records for one queue ID and confirm the proposal is invalid.
Set canonical_queue_mutated=true and confirm fail-closed rejection.
